title: Create Colonies
description: A lightweight Forge 1.20.1 modpack combining Create, MineColonies, and quality-of-life enhancements. Build, automate, and expand with a fully customized UI and preconfigured experience.
body:
**Recommended mod: [Style Colonies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stylecolonies) on CurseForge.
This mod is not included due to licensing, but it's highly recommended for full experience.**

##  🧱 Create Colonies
Create Colonies is a focused Forge 1.20.1 modpack built around two core experiences: automation with Create and settlement management with MineColonies. No clutter, no unnecessary side mods — just you, your colony, and your machines.

##  🎮 Why this pack?
I made this modpack because I couldn’t find a simple, lightweight setup that felt right. This is my first published pack, and it’s designed to be clean, functional, and ready to play. Perfect for “100 Days” videos or long-term survival worlds — just add your favorite extras like ReplayMod and go. 

##  **🔧 What’s included:**
- Create (of course) — build kinetic contraptions, trains, and factories
- MineColonies — manage workers, expand your town, and shape your colony
- FancyMenu — custom menus, loading screens, and meme-infused UI polish
- QoL Mods — REI, Jade, AppleSkin, Mouse Tweaks and more
- Embeddium + Oculus — performance and shader support without OptiFine

## **🔄 Updates & Feedback:**
I plan to keep improving the pack over time — possibly adding more mods, refining configs, and expanding features. One thing is certain: I’ll be releasing a Lite version for lower-end PCs. If you have any suggestions or feedback, feel free to reach out on Discord: _duskwisper_bitpix_
